title: Build GLORY 123 e-commerce website with product management, cart, and payment

requirements.text: Implement a yellow color theme throughout the website with a classic, minimalist design inspired by Apple's aesthetic (clean typography, generous whitespace, high-quality product imagery layout)

quotes: theme colour should be yellow make the website well detailed and classic like apple website

acceptanceCriteria: Primary color scheme uses yellow as the dominant theme color
Design features clean typography and generous whitespace
Layout is minimalist and visually polished

requirements.text: Create backend data model and CRUD operations for products with fields: name, category, price, description, and support for multiple customer reviews per product

quotes: I can add product and make categories and set price of the product and write discription also with a customer review down

acceptanceCriteria: Products can be created with name, category, price, and description
Products support multiple customer reviews
CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete) work for products

requirements.text: Build an admin interface to add products, assign them to categories, set prices, and write descriptions

quotes: I can add product and make categories and set price of the product and write discription

acceptanceCriteria: Admin can create new products via a form
Form includes fields for name, category, price, and description
Products are successfully stored in the backend

requirements.text: Display products on the main page with category filtering and show customer reviews below each product detail view
acceptanceCriteria: Products are displayed on the main page
Users can filter products by category
Product detail view shows customer reviews below product information

requirements.text: Implement a shopping cart page where users can view selected products, adjust quantities, and see the total price
acceptanceCriteria: Cart page displays all items added to cart
Users can adjust item quantities in cart
Total price updates dynamically based on cart contents

requirements.text: Create a payment page with two payment options: Cash on Delivery and UPI, where UPI payments are directed to UPI ID 9892246308-2@axl

quotes: In the payment page add option of CASH ON DELIVERY and UPI
receive all the payments done by the customer should receive on this UPI id 9892246308-2@axl

acceptanceCriteria: Payment page offers Cash on Delivery option
Payment page offers UPI payment option
UPI payments display or use UPI ID 9892246308-2@axl
Order submission captures payment method choice

requirements.text: Add a product search functionality that allows users to search for products by name or description

quotes: Add option to search for product

acceptanceCriteria: Search bar is visible on the main product listing page
Search filters products by name or description
Search results update dynamically as user types or submits query

requirements.text: Display contact information in the website footer with phone number 9892246308 and address R.N.15 DHARAVI MUMBAI

quotes: Make a contact information in the bottom of the website '9892246308' contact number and 'R.N.15 DHARAVI MUMBAI' address

acceptanceCriteria: Footer is visible on all pages
Footer displays phone number: 9892246308
Footer displays address: R.N.15 DHARAVI MUMBAI

constraints: Use yellow as the primary theme color throughout the website
UPI payment ID must be exactly 9892246308-2@axl
Contact address must be R.N.15 DHARAVI MUMBAI
nonGoals: Integration with actual payment gateways or real-time UPI processing
User authentication or customer account management

required: Hero banner image for e-commerce homepage with elegant yellow-themed product showcase (hero-banner.dim_1920x600.png)
Placeholder product images with yellow accents for sample catalog items (product-placeholder-1.dim_400x400.png, product-placeholder-2.dim_400x400.png, product-placeholder-3.dim_400x400.png)
